warnings: Native execution was capability-probed; results do not generalize to other PyTorch builds or CPUs without a new probe.
uses a PyTorch quantized-engine ABI; exact engine and torch version are pinned
Opaque packed tensors are reloadable only where the recorded PyTorch version passes the same KleidiAI capability probe.
opaque packed weights require the recorded PyTorch/KleidiAI kernel ABI

gloo.scope: local CPU two-process gloo all-reduce only; does not validate model sharding, distributed inference, routing, checkpointing, or performance

energy.reason: Apple powermetrics requires superuser privileges; its per-process energy impact is a platform-specific proxy and is not accepted as joules

environment.operator_declared_hardware_label: Apple M3 MacBook Air (8 cores, 16 GB)
environment.operator_hardware_label_scope: explicit CLI metadata; CPU workload host, not inferred from sandbox probes

limitations: This is one deterministic 32-story subset and one hardware/software environment.
Only attention/ordinary concrete linear leaves are quantized; fused MoE expert tensors, routers, embeddings, normalization, and the output head remain float32.
The model publisher states that expert weights repeat one trained TinyStories model.
The model publisher states that routers were randomly initialized, so routing drift does not measure preservation of learned expert specialization.
Greedy generation exact match on four declared prompts is a regression signal, not a general generation-quality score.
The candidate memory values are tensor-state storage, not measured process peak RSS.

evidence_curation.reason: Remove local executable identity and uncontrolled elapsed durations while retaining all scientific measurements, manifests, provenance, per-sample hashes/losses, and routing comparisons.
